title: Scented Swing Bin Liners 50l | 45 Lemon Scented Bin Bags 50 Litre | Tie Handles 60cm X 94cm 50l Bin Bags 50L (45 Liners)
features: Fresh Lemon Scent – Each bin liner is infused with a pleasant lemon fragrance to help neutralize unpleasant odours and keep your kitchen or workspace smelling fresh.
Large 50L Capacity – Designed to fit standard swing bins, these 50-litre bags measure 60cm x 94cm, offering ample space for everyday household or office waste.
Convenient Tie Handles – Built-in strong tie handles make it easy to close, lift, and carry your bin liner without mess or fuss.
Tear-Resistant Design – Made from durable, high-quality plastic to prevent leaks, splits, and spills even when filled with heavier waste.
Great Value Pack – Includes 45 scented bin liners in one pack, offering long-lasting supply and excellent value for everyday use.
description: Keep your home or workspace clean and fresh with our Scented Swing Bin Liners – 50L (45 Liners). Specially designed for convenience and reliability, these large bin bags are perfect for everyday use in kitchens, offices, and utility areas. Each liner is lightly infused with a refreshing lemon scent to help mask unpleasant odours, keeping your bin area smelling clean and pleasant between changes. Measuring 60cm x 94cm, they’re the ideal size for standard 50L swing bins and offer plenty of space for all types of household or office waste. Built with durable, tear-resistant plastic, these bags are tough enough to handle heavier loads without splitting or leaking. The strong tie handles make disposal quick, clean, and easy — just tie, lift, and toss. Whether you're dealing with kitchen scraps, packaging waste, or general rubbish, these liners get the job done with minimal hassle. With 45 liners per pack, you’ll enjoy great value and long-lasting supply, helping you stay stocked up and stress-free. Upgrade your waste disposal routine with these lemon-scented, strong, and spacious bin liners — a practical essential for any tidy, fresh-smelling home or office.
